name: XM1014 | 血红巨蟒
descriptionEn: The XM1014 is a powerful fully automatic shotgun that justifies its heftier price tag with the ability to paint a room with lead fast. It has been painted with a snakeskin patterned hydrographic. I know you don't believe in the cause...and when I expose you, Valeria will have your head - The Shield and The Serpent Part 1
descriptionZh: XM1014 是一把强大的全自动霰弹枪，其高昂的价格赋予了它高射速和室内清剿的能力。 这把武器使用蛇皮图案的花纹进行了涂装。 我知道你不相信这理由… 当我揭露你时，瓦莱里娅将取你首级 -《盾与蛇（上）》
